subject: Product availability enquiry
body: Hi, we're looking for a Fitting – SS, Male Elbow, 1/2in. Can you advise on availability and lead time?

classification.reasoning: The customer is asking about availability and lead time for a specific product.

draft_reply:
We have received your inquiry regarding the Fitting – SS, Male Elbow, 1/2in and appreciate your interest in our products. We will review your request and assess the availability of the specified item. Our team will be in touch with you shortly to discuss further details and provide an update on the next steps. We appreciate your patience and look forward to responding to your inquiry.

Sales Team

subject: Technician required - Penang
body: Our gauge installed last year is showing inconsistent readings. Serial number FC-2291. We need a technician on site ASAP, based in Penang.

classification.reasoning: The customer explicitly states 'ASAP' and reports an issue with their gauge, indicating a production-impacting problem.

subject: Re: Quote QT-4821
body: Just following up on quote QT-4821 we received 2 weeks ago. Has pricing changed? We're ready to proceed.

classification.reasoning: The customer mentions a specific quote number and asks if pricing has changed.

draft_reply:
We have received your follow-up email regarding quote QT-4821 and appreciate your interest in proceeding. We will review the current status of your quote and assess any potential changes. A member of our team will be in touch with you shortly to discuss the next steps and provide an update on your quote. We look forward to speaking with you soon.

Sales Team

subject: URGENT - production line down
